title: 2024 Chevrolet Silverado EV Work Truck
description:
CHECK OUT THIS NEW 2024 Chevrolet Silverado EV available at PARKS CHEVROLET of SPARTANBURG, SC. This Chevrolet Silverado EV, PRICED AT $48,900 won't last long!!! This Electric ZEV Chevrolet Silverado EV is powered by a 1-Speed Automatic and includes these features and benefits:

- Adaptive Cruise Control
- Apple CarPlay / Android Auto
- Back-up Camera
- Blind Spot Detection
- Bluetooth
- Multi Zone Climate Control
- Parking Sensors
- Remote Keyless Entry
- Remote Start
- SiriusXM Ready
- Surround View Camera
- Touchscreen Radio

Elevate your driving experience with the exceptional 2024 Chevrolet Silverado EV Work Truck. Boasting an impressive electric powertrain, this vehicle delivers an exceptional blend of performance, efficiency, and technology. With a city MPGe of 72 and a highway MPGe of 62, you'll enjoy exceptional range and cost savings.

The Silverado EV Work Truck is meticulously engineered to provide a smooth, comfortable, and confident ride. Its advanced 4-Wheel Independent Premium Ride Suspension system ensures a refined and responsive handling experience, while the powerful electric motor and all-wheel drive configuration provide ample traction and control in any driving condition.

Inside, the Silverado EV Work Truck is equipped with a wealth of cutting-edge features that enhance both functionality and convenience. The 11.3 Diagonal Advanced Color LCD Display provides intuitive access to navigation, entertainment, and vehicle settings, while the Wireless Phone Projection seamlessly integrates your smartphone for hands-free connectivity.

Safety is a top priority, and the Silverado EV Work Truck delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver assistance technologies. Features like Blind Spot Detection, Rear Camera, and Parking Sensors help you navigate with confidence, while the Dual Front Impact Airbags and Occupant Sensing Airbag provide added protection in the event of a collision.

Whether you're tackling your daily commute or taking on larger projects, the 2024 Chevrolet Silverado EV Work Truck is the perfect companion. Experience the future of electric trucks today at Parks Chevrolet of Spartanburg.
